flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hinds Community College are 7% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($30.8k vs $33.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hinds Community College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (7.7k → 6.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hinds Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hinds Community College rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $9.4k).
